projects.name: PosturePal – An AI-Based Posture Monitoring System
projects.description: Engineered a real-time posture and blink-rate monitoring system, achieving 92% classification accuracy across 5 posture classes, validated using k-fold cross-validation for generalisability. Collected real-world data from 30+ subjects (classmates and faculty), extracting MediaPipe landmarks from posture videos to build 1,400+ labelled samples with biomechanical features. Built an end-to-end pipeline (video → landmarks → feature engineering → XGBoost) and developed a WebSocket-based alert system with JWT authentication and PostgreSQL deployment on GCP.

projects.name: Campus Lost & Found System
projects.description: Built a full-stack lost & found platform with image upload (Cloudinary), category-based filtering, and location search - reducing manual item-matching effort for a campus of 1000+ students. Engineered a role-based REST API with JWT authentication, separating student and admin access to enable moderation, item verification, and false-report prevention. Implemented multi-filter search (category + location + status) with MySQL query optimisation.
